content:
Helloooh! I must say that I've been obsessing over this game ever since yesterday when I downloaded it. I've been playing it nonstop while watching tutorials and team-guides, though everything seemed so complicated, cuz I thought mono-teams were best but it seems like mixing them is better?. So I was wondering what teams to build with my current roaster and who to focus leveling and all. Of course, Ryker MUST be one of the characters I will focus on, duh🙂‍↕️
I've got Saya's weapon or whatever it was called and I haven't used the free weapon selector yet. Also, Hameln or Tawil E2?😄

worry less about realms and more about character synergy,. Mono teams are not better or worse that dual teams, it's a matter of whether the characters involve like them or not. Ryker is fairly versatile since his main deal is drawing/tutoring cards and giving bonuses through long explorations, so he is fairly versatile.

I'm going to assume that you're asking mainly for story purposes, because D-Tide is a different approach. Also, while Tawil is not a bad unit, she is mainly a support. You can make her work as a dps, but it is a pain to work with on later chapters and does not scale well, so she would require whale amounts of investment (trust me, back when I was new I played her as a dps at e2 and made me take a break from the game due to how mind numb it felt).

Saya's wheel of destiny (WoD for short) is good for the +1 arith alone, you can put it on any support and call it a day.

Now, considering that you like Tawil and Hameln, I would personally recommend you give Vortice e1 a shot (her echoing wishes banner is pretty close). Vortice, with her posse, is a dps that does not need to play many cards and likes keyflare, and Tawil likes to play her cards and gives a lot of keyflare. Vortice/Tawil/Ryker/Hameln should work quite fine, and you can swap Ryker or Hameln for Celeste, Caecus or Sanga if you need more sustain or weakness. When exalting Tawil, try to fish for Vortices cards.

Saya/Thais also rocks since they increase your damage through corruption to a funny degree. Saya works well with a myriad of characters, including your Sanga and GMurphy, but both need investment (especially GMurphy, e3 at the very very least and OE is highly recommended if you want to pursue her as a dps, plus her team usual team looks different in arc2 content). Here's a readup in this server on possible Saya comps: https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1510243169336430644

Finally, you might want to look up Kath or Mouchette comps if you enjoy Ryker to such a degree, since, to my knowledge, is where he shines the most (particularly Kathigu-Ra, since she likes to play her cards on the regular and enjoys crit buffs quite a bit).
btw, I'm unsure if you've read this already, but Cheri's guide is a really good read

Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:
## General Guide
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1THjxR9hHs4NWHqSWHHa2dHAGuE_cRGelfzXdBfCnIlM/edit?usp=sharing>) by Cheri
- [Game Mechanics](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1511362816362283118) by Mythag University
- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University 
- [Morimens Database and Teambuiler](https://skeydb.com/#/database) by Fjant
## Mode Specific
- [P-Dive Shortest Map Analysis](<https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1483756178340315216>) by Aurora
## Compendium
- [Morimens Compendium](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University
- [Boss Compendium](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University

Plus, I have a sneaking suspicion that you've been following Flares' video guides. Take his advice with a grain of salt, since he is very opinionated and some of his tips are also really outdated. His advice and demeanor almost made me quit the game back when I was new around 10 months ago. To quote Cheri's guide:
oh, and between Hameln e2 and Tawil e2, it's Tawil e2 without a shadow of a doubt (assuming you're using her ofc).
help please <:Clem_question:1513280243459166380>

if you do work on your saya and find any cool teams you use please ss and send them here too, it would help alot
im struggling with sayas discard function have yet to make it work for me not against me

Don’t really have any shielding in that team usually, aigis can stall with her exalt to petrify (stun) all enemies for a turn or you just use furnace to heal up. Caro mouch is usually kill them before they kill you and saya makes it so you can only use the furnace every 3 turns but it’s fatter heals

Her 0 cost discard for corrosion is kinda hard to use in a non discard team but it’s basically if you have a bad hand and the 0 cost is there, you use it to hopefully redraw your dps cards then you can proc the corrosion with that
But it has retain so you can save it until you find a right time to use it
what is furnace?
mmm i see
what would a discard team look like? (i dont know discard characters)
In caro realm, near the left under your units' portraits there's like a red line and a red circle filled with blood, if you click on the circle you can use the furnace to heal you
It's usually like this
Aurita and corpo are core for discard team

try Faint (premium support and Sorel likes DR), Leigh (more healing and str) or even Aigis (tons of vuln, stuns opponent for 1 turn) instead of 24, otherwise afaik (I'm not a Sorel player) that team is pretty good already.

The other teams that I see from a first viewing are:

- Vortice e1 (banner incoming in a couple days) w/ Murphy, Ramona and flex (Hameln/Doll/Myriam/Nautila/Celeste if you get her from standard).

- Mouchette (already talked about in this thread).

- Idk nearly enough about 24 to suggest comps, and is also much higher effort than the others, but you should be able to cook something with her, the SR characters and Hameln/Karen. Would not recommend as a new player though.

Anything else would require multiple copies of particular units that may or may not be available in the near future. I will say that, besides the obvious 2 dps that everybody recommends, both Arachne (last echo banner) and Clementine (on the 15th) should be considered. Even more so considering that they benefit Mouchette, Kath, Gelot and Pollux greatly and could open you to more teams in the future.
mhm will do, im super interested in vortice aswell as mouchette so will grab a few of her
knowing how much copies of which char has been a struggle so far (im a dolphin in terms of spending so i dont mind gettiing a few)
if you end up playing Vortice, make sure to unlock her Psyche Deepdive to grab her Posse
bet
she really wants it, especially at lower enlightement
will i unlock her posse overtime or is there something i need to do
each daily quests will give you one Reality Verge, you need 3 to unlock any particular psyche deepdive
every single side content and end of chapter will give you a new posse
usually related to the featured character
got it will save up to get hers then
which one will moushe need or even the team i was using will need if you know
mouch is more flexible, but she likes her posse, unlocked in her Multiverse Link (since she's a crossover character). It will cost you 7 reality verges though, so a week of daily missions
damn
alr
but you can also use some of the posses you unlock through the main story with, even more so at your current point in the game
chapters 1 and 2 have two pretty good posses
I sometimes use chapter 2's to this day if the team requires extra arithmetica
okayy thats good so its right around the corner
ohh that
keeping it 100 i didnt even notice it
it's the ball, not the 30/100 bar (that's the embryo meter, once filled it gives you an embryo). The ball is the furnace and, after being used, will heal you for the amount
Do keep in mind that propagule caro (Saya's passive) changes how furnace and embryos works, but the idea is the same
mm i see
"Vortice e1 (banner incoming in a couple days) w/ Murphy, Ramona and flex (Hameln/Doll/Myriam/Nautila/Celeste if you get her from standard)." which murphy? basic one?
if so then i have a home waiting for vortice alrdy
Yea basic one

for further context, as a community we call alt units or genesis by the same name and adding g at the beginning. For example, the community calls Murphy: Fauxborn, gmurphy. Doll: Inferno is gdoll and so on.

make sure that you are generating enough keyflare each turn, since you want to activate Vortice's posse every turn if able. This is the reason behind my Ramona suggestion, since she is one of the most versatile keyflare generators in the game. This team works, but make sure that one of your awakeners has wheels that help them generate keyflare
this guide has a section called "The Almighty Keyflare Bot" that goes in detail about it, I highly encourage a read. Even more so for the Vortice comp.

Yellow, first time asking for advice. Started a few weeks ago and I'm currently on chapter 5 lvl 12. Been freestyling the previous chapters but now Goliath has been kicking my butt for a good while so I have decided to seek assistance!

Looking for advice on my current team comp since I feel like I'm just bleeding myself out whenever I use Ghelot.. Should I be leveling characters? Trying P-dive or smth else? Still trying to understand the daily grind and making sure I'm not missing anything important. I still got 170 ethereal cores and planning to save for Clementine on the Triune verdant banner next week since I absolutely adore her! But I'm willing to blow a few pulls on any other upcoming character that can help my account.

As of now, here's my current team and cast of characters.

Hi, I'm a semi casual player started a bit before the last anni. Normally I have 5 team that can do D-tide 350, a little bit higher on a good week and if I'm feeling commited enough to push for more. But I always have the feeling that some of my awakeners are underutilized even though I like them, and some of my current team are not consistent enough, or could cover all bases like vuln/weaken or have no sustain. So here's my awakener list and please help me craft 5 or more teams that can clear at least Alert3, maybe 4. Also please criticize my current comp and make modification if they are not good enough.

My current comp for D-tide are:
1. Kath OE / GDoll OE / Ryker E3 / GMurphy OE
Most comfortable and invested team, although some of them I think should be the core of other teams

2. Tawil E3/ Hameln E2/ Nautila OE/ Caecus Max
Super good at act 1, falls off a bit in astral reign, but good defense and sustain

3. Aurita Max/ Corpo E3/ Tulu +2/ Murphy E3
Mostly used for W3 boss, somehow lack sustain for longer wave even with 2 wardens and aeqor shield.

4. Nymph Max/ Lily E1 / Agripa OE/ Xu E3
Poison team, mostly for W4 because poison seems better for big mobs/boss

5. Castor E3 / Arachne OE/ Horla E1/ Pollux E3
I feel this is a very easy to play team, and have strong burst turn with Pollux OE, Castor's corrosion and Arachne's pursuit. But this team lacks sustain and one wrong move can take off a lot of HP.

6. Lotan Max / Aigis OE / Thais E3/ Mouchette OE
Mouchette is the main carry, Lotan is just there to help because she has 3 strike cards with low cost. Thais is essential for duping Mouchette's card. Aigis for keyflare and vuln.This team is easy to play but lack defense.

There are some other awakener I really like but can not find a consistent team for them yet: Miriam, Saya, Ogier, Tinct, 24, Vortice, Ramona (both version), Winkler, Jenkin. 

Please help me so that I can reach 400, and maybe 425 one day. Many thanks!
